data.content:
Use the `--filter` option with `dotnet test`:

```bash
dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests
```

This matches any test whose fully qualified name contains `ReportExporterTests`, running only that class. Alternatively, you can filter by class name explicitly:

```bash
dotnet test --filter Class~ReportExporterTests
```
